coverage.notes: All try/catch blocks now exercised via chmod permission tests and overwrite conflict tests. Save serialization path covered. TypeMapping only had 2 lines added.

findings.issue: [RESOLVED in v7] Exception handling try/catch blocks now tested: Delete_ReadOnlyParent, Save_ReadOnlyDir, Read_PermissionDenied, List_PermissionDenied use chmod to trigger IOException/UnauthorizedAccessException. Copy/Move overwrite=false tests trigger IOException for existing dest.
No PLang .goal tests for file operations. Blocked — requires LLM builder to generate .pr files. Noted as future work by coder.
findings.impact: Full pipeline (builder -> .pr -> GoalMapper -> runtime) not validated for file/path actions. C# integration tests partially compensate.
findings.suggestion: Create when builder is available. Not blocking merge.

findings.issue: [RESOLVED in v7] Copy/Move overwrite conflict tests added: OverwriteFalse_ReturnsIOError and OverwriteTrue_Succeeds for both Copy and Move.
[RESOLVED in v7] Save_Object_SerializesToJson covers the else branch (SerializeAsync). Verifies content contains expected values.
[RESOLVED in v7] All error-path tests now check Error.Key and Error.StatusCode.
[RESOLVED in v7] Relative_StripsRootDirectory now asserts exact value.
[RESOLVED in v7] List test now verifies file names, not just count.
[RESOLVED in v7] Copy test verifies source still exists after copy.

summary: All 1239 C# tests pass (+12 new from coder v7). All 7 actionable findings from tester v1 resolved: exception handling catch blocks tested via chmod permission tests and overwrite conflicts, Save serialization covered, error assertions strengthened, Relative/List/Copy assertions tightened. Auditor v2 observations also fixed (ResolveDestination in Move, Relative root returns '.'). Only remaining: PLang .goal tests (blocked on builder, not blocking merge). Verdict: approved.
